---
description: Provide deep architectural explanation of selected code
agent: Architect
---

Analyze the selected code and provide a dry, highly technical explanation focused on:
- End-to-end data/control flow.
- Architectural boundaries and coupling points.
- Runtime behavior, side effects, and error paths.
- Relevant design patterns and anti-patterns in use.

Constraints:
- Skip beginner-level programming explanations.
- Use repository-specific terminology and file references.
- Prefer precise mechanics over high-level summaries.
